name: Arduino ISP Header
description: Target part placeholder for the 2x3 ISP connector you prefer.

name: JST XH 1xN 2.50mm Vertical
description: Generated KiCad 9 JST XH vertical wire-to-board connector. Copying asks only for pin count; default is 2.

name: Pin Header 1xN 2.54mm Horizontal
description: Variable pin header. Only the pin count should be requested when copying.

name: Pin Header 1xN 2.54mm Vertical Male
description: Generated KiCad 9 single-row vertical male pin header. Copying asks only for pin count; default is 4.

name: Pin Socket 1xN 2.54mm Vertical Female
description: Generated KiCad 9 single-row vertical female pin socket. Copying asks only for pin count; default is 4.

name: Terminal Block 5.08mm 2 Pin
description: Target part placeholder until the preferred KiCad 9 footprint is captured.

name: USB-B Female
description: Target part placeholder until the exact connector footprint is captured.

name: ATmega328P DIP-28 Socket
description: Verified KiCad 9 ATmega328P DIP-28 snippet using the long-pad socket footprint.

name: Mounting Hole M2.5 Pad Via

snippet:
(lib_symbols
